assessor_1_raw:
## Assessment 1 (Run 3): Readmission Model

Readmitted flag in sequence creates unverified shortcut assumption. ECE stopping/selection misaligned with discrimination hypothesis. Both concrete. Verdict: critique_wins
assessor_2_raw:
## Assessment 2 (Run 3): Readmission Model

Two concrete documented flaws: label-derived readmitted flag in sequence embedding; ECE as primary metric and early stopping criterion when hypothesis is about discrimination improvement. Verdict: critique_wins
assessor_3_raw:
## Assessment 3 (Run 3): Readmission Model

Chronological split is excellent. But the readmitted (0/1) flag creates a gradient signal shortcut in the jointly-trained embedding that the design does not ablate. ECE selection criterion will optimize toward calibration rather than discrimination. Verdict: critique_wins
adjudication_raw:
## Ensemble Synthesis (Run 3)

Unanimous critique_wins: 3/3.

Verdict: critique_wins
